description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly domed top and bottom. The front of the can features the brand name 'Sproot' in a stylized yellow-green font, accompanied by sparkling star graphics and the phrase 'Original Taste' below. The back of the can displays a detailed nutrition facts label in both English and French, as well as an ingredients list. The can's surface is predominantly white with metallic silver at the top and bottom rims, and the pull tab is a typical metallic style found on most soda cans. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of rust, and the can appears clean and intact. The overall appearance suggests it is an unopened, undamaged beverage can commonly found as litter or street trash in urban environments.
description: A clean, white aluminum beverage can labeled 'Sproot' with nutrition facts and a metallic pull tab, showing no visible damage.
description_view_0: The can's nutrition facts and ingredients label are clearly visible, occupying most of the visible surface.
description_view_1: The side of the can shows the edge of the nutrition label and the start of the ingredients list, with minimal branding visible.
description_view_2: The front of the can displays the 'Sproot' brand name, sparkling star graphics, and 'Original Taste' text.
description_view_3: This view shows the side of the can with partial visibility of the 'Sproot' logo and the edge of the nutrition label.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of the can features the 'Sproot' brand name in a stylized yellow-green font with sparkling star graphics.
